siteId.description: Customer.io site ID. This can be found on your [API Credentials page](https://fly.customer.io/settings/api_credentials).
siteId.label: Site ID

apiKey.description: Customer.io API key. This can be found on your [API Credentials page](https://fly.customer.io/settings/api_credentials).
apiKey.label: API Key

actions.name: Create or Update Device
actions.description: Create or update a person's device.
actions.defaultTrigger: event = "Application Installed" or event = "Application Opened" or event = "Device Created or Updated"

fields.label: Person ID
fields.description: The ID of the person that this mobile device belongs to.

person_id.title: Person ID
person_id.description: The ID of the person that this mobile device belongs to.

fields.label: Device ID
fields.description: The device token of a customer's mobile device.

device_id.title: Device ID
device_id.description: The device token of a customer's mobile device.

fields.label: App Version
fields.description: The version of the App

fields.label: Platform
fields.description: The mobile device's platform. ("ios" or "android")

fields.label: Last Used
fields.description: The timestamp for when the mobile device was last used. Default is current date and time.

last_used.title: Last Used
last_used.description: The timestamp for when the mobile device was last used. Default is current date and time.

fields.label: Event Attributes
fields.description: Optional data that you can reference to segment your audience, like a person's attributes, but specific to a device.

attributes.title: Event Attributes
attributes.description: Optional data that you can reference to segment your audience, like a person's attributes, but specific to a device.

fields.label: Convert Timestamps
fields.description: Convert dates to Unix timestamps (seconds since Epoch).

convert_timestamp.title: Convert Timestamps
convert_timestamp.description: Convert dates to Unix timestamps (seconds since Epoch).

fields.label: Enable Batching
fields.description: Set as true to ensure Segment sends data to Customer.io in batches.

enable_batching.title: Enable Batching
enable_batching.description: Set as true to ensure Segment sends data to Customer.io in batches.

fields.label: Batch Size
fields.description: Maximum number of events to include in each batch. Actual batch sizes may be lower.

batch_size.title: Batch Size
batch_size.description: Maximum number of events to include in each batch. Actual batch sizes may be lower.

actions.name: Create or Update Object
actions.description: Create an object in Customer.io or update them if they exist.

fields.label: Object ID
fields.description: The ID used to uniquely identify an object in Customer.io. [Learn more](https://customer.io/docs/object-relationships).

id.title: Object ID
id.description: The ID used to uniquely identify an object in Customer.io. [Learn more](https://customer.io/docs/object-relationships).

fields.label: Created At
fields.description: A timestamp of when the object was created.

created_at.title: Created At
created_at.description: A timestamp of when the object was created.

fields.label: Object Attributes
fields.description: Optional attributes for the object. When updating an object, attributes are added or updated, not removed.

custom_attributes.title: Object Attributes
custom_attributes.description: Optional attributes for the object. When updating an object, attributes are added or updated, not removed.

fields.label: Relationship Attributes
fields.description: Optional attributes for the relationship between the object and the user. When updating an relationship, attributes are added or updated, not removed.

relationship_attributes.title: Relationship Attributes
relationship_attributes.description: Optional attributes for the relationship between the object and the user. When updating an relationship, attributes are added or updated, not removed.

fields.description: The ID used to relate a user to an object in Customer.io. [Learn more](https://customer.io/docs/identifying-people/#identifiers).

user_id.description: The ID used to relate a user to an object in Customer.io. [Learn more](https://customer.io/docs/identifying-people/#identifiers).

fields.label: Anonymous ID
fields.description: An anonymous ID to relate to an object when no Person ID exists. [Learn more](https://customer.io/docs/anonymous-events/).

anonymous_id.title: Anonymous ID
anonymous_id.description: An anonymous ID to relate to an object when no Person ID exists. [Learn more](https://customer.io/docs/anonymous-events/).

fields.description: The ID used to uniquely identify a custom object type in Customer.io. [Learn more](https://customer.io/docs/object-relationships).

object_type_id.description: The ID used to uniquely identify a custom object type in Customer.io. [Learn more](https://customer.io/docs/object-relationships).

fields.label: Primary User
fields.description: The person that you want to remain after the merge, identified by id, email or cio_id. This person receives information from the secondary person in the merge.

primary.title: Primary User
primary.description: The person that you want to remain after the merge, identified by id, email or cio_id. This person receives information from the secondary person in the merge.

fields.label: Secondary User
fields.description: The person that you want to delete after the merge, identified by id, email or cio_id. This person's information is merged into the primary person's profile and then it is deleted.

secondary.title: Secondary User
secondary.description: The person that you want to delete after the merge, identified by id, email or cio_id. This person's information is merged into the primary person's profile and then it is deleted.

actions.name: Report Delivery Event
actions.description: Report delivery metrics for a message sent from the Customer.io Journeys product.

fields.label: Delivery ID
fields.description: The CIO-Delivery-ID from the message that you want to associate the metric with.

delivery_id.title: Delivery ID
delivery_id.description: The CIO-Delivery-ID from the message that you want to associate the metric with.

fields.label: Metric
fields.description: The metric you want to report back to Customer.io. Not all metrics are available for all channels. Please refer to the [documentation](https://customer.io/docs/api/track/#operation/metrics) for more information.

metric.title: Metric
metric.description: The metric you want to report back to Customer.io. Not all metrics are available for all channels. Please refer to the [documentation](https://customer.io/docs/api/track/#operation/metrics) for more information.

fields.label: Recipient
fields.description: Information about who the message was delivered to. For email, SMS and mobile push this is the email address, phone number and device token, respectively.

recipient.title: Recipient
recipient.description: Information about who the message was delivered to. For email, SMS and mobile push this is the email address, phone number and device token, respectively.

fields.label: Reason
fields.description: For metrics indicating a failure, this field provides information for the failure.

reason.title: Reason
reason.description: For metrics indicating a failure, this field provides information for the failure.

fields.label: Href
fields.description: For click metrics, this is the link that was clicked.

href.title: Href
href.description: For click metrics, this is the link that was clicked.

fields.label: Action Name
fields.description: For In-App messages, this is the name of the action that was clicked.

action_name.title: Action Name
action_name.description: For In-App messages, this is the name of the action that was clicked.

fields.label: Action Value
fields.description: For In-App messages, this is the value of the action that was clicked.

action_value.title: Action Value
action_value.description: For In-App messages, this is the value of the action that was clicked.

fields.label: Timestamp
fields.description: A timestamp of when the metric event took place. Default is when the event was triggered.

timestamp.title: Timestamp
timestamp.description: A timestamp of when the metric event took place. Default is when the event was triggered.

fields.label: Enable Batching
fields.description: Set as true to ensure Segment sends data to Customer.io in batches.

enable_batching.title: Enable Batching
enable_batching.description: Set as true to ensure Segment sends data to Customer.io in batches.

fields.label: Batch Size
fields.description: Maximum number of events to include in each batch. Actual batch sizes may be lower.

batch_size.title: Batch Size
batch_size.description: Maximum number of events to include in each batch. Actual batch sizes may be lower.

actions.name: Track Event
actions.description: Track an event for a known or anonymous person.
actions.defaultTrigger:
type = "track"
    and event != "Application Installed"
    and event != "Application Opened"
    and event != "Application Uninstalled"
    and event != "Device Created or Updated"
    and event != "Device Deleted"
    and event != "Relationship Deleted"
    and event != "User Deleted"
    and event != "User Suppressed"
    and event != "User Unsuppressed"
    and event != "Object Deleted"
    and event != "Report Delivery Event"
    and event != "Report Content Event"

presets.name: Create or Update Device
presets.subscribe:
event = "Application Installed"
        or event = "Application Opened"
        or event = "Device Created or Updated"

presets.name: Track Event
presets.subscribe:
type = "track"
        and event != "Application Installed"
        and event != "Application Opened"
        and event != "Application Uninstalled"
        and event != "Device Created or Updated"
        and event != "Device Deleted"
        and event != "Relationship Deleted"
        and event != "User Deleted"
        and event != "User Suppressed"
        and event != "User Unsuppressed"
        and event != "Object Deleted"
        and event != "Report Delivery Event"
        and event != "Report Content Event"
